title: 物流延误、清关问题和跟踪更新
theme: 从 delayed shipment / customs hold / tracking update 开始
goals: 能解释货物运输延误、清关卡住和派送异常
能用 tracking update、clearance status 和 estimated arrival 给客户清晰进展
能协调 carrier、货代和客户一起处理物流异常

review.title: Day 25 复习
items: 昨天练了 pickup、cut-off time、warehouse address、factory pickup、delivery note 和 warehouse receipt。
今天继续物流阶段：货物交给货代或运输商后，客户最关心货到哪里、为什么没动、什么时候能到。
物流跟进不能只发单号，要说明当前状态、异常原因、谁在处理和下一次更新时间。

preview.scenario: 客户问货物为什么还没到，跟踪信息没有更新，或者清关被卡住。你需要联系货代或承运商，解释当前状态，并给出下一步更新。
needToKnow: delayed shipment 表示货物运输延误，不等于生产延误。
customs hold 表示货物被海关暂扣或等待审核，需要确认原因和所需文件。
delivery exception 是运输商系统里的派送异常状态，通常需要进一步核实。

vocabulary.meaning: 延误的货件 / 运输延误
vocabulary.usage: 用于说明货物在运输途中出现延迟。
vocabulary.example: We are checking the reason for the delayed shipment.

vocabulary.meaning: 海关暂扣 / 清关卡住
vocabulary.usage: 用于说明货物在海关等待审核或补充资料。
vocabulary.example: The shipment is currently under customs hold.

vocabulary.usage: 用于提供运输状态的新信息。
vocabulary.example: I will send you the tracking update as soon as I receive it.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明货物已经发出，正在运输途中。
vocabulary.example: The goods are still in transit.

vocabulary.usage: 用于确认货物是否已清关、等待审核或需要资料。
vocabulary.example: We are checking the clearance status with the forwarder.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明货物预计到港、到仓或派送时间。
vocabulary.example: The estimated arrival is next Monday.

vocabulary.usage: 用于 DHL、FedEx、UPS、船公司或卡车公司等运输方。
vocabulary.example: We are checking the status with the carrier.

vocabulary.usage: 用于运输商系统显示地址、清关、收件人或派送失败等异常。
vocabulary.example: The tracking page shows a delivery exception.

sentences.label: 解释运输延误
sentences.natural: The shipment is delayed, and we are checking the reason.
sentences.business: We are checking the reason for the delayed shipment with the carrier and will update you as soon as we receive the details.

sentences.label: 说明清关卡住
sentences.natural: The shipment is currently under customs hold.
sentences.business: The shipment is currently under customs hold, and we are checking the clearance status with the forwarder.

sentences.label: 提供物流更新
sentences.natural: I will send you the tracking update once I receive it.
sentences.business: I will contact the carrier now and send you the latest tracking update once I receive it.

sentences.label: 说明运输中
sentences.natural: The goods are still in transit.
sentences.business: The goods are still in transit, and the estimated arrival is next Monday based on the latest carrier update.

sentences.label: 处理派送异常
sentences.natural: The tracking page shows a delivery exception.
sentences.business: The tracking page shows a delivery exception, so we are checking with the carrier to confirm whether they need additional information.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太被动，没有说明延误原因、谁在查、什么时候更新。
chatAnalysis.better: The shipment is delayed, and we are checking the reason.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: We are checking the reason for the delayed shipment with the carrier and will update you as soon as we receive the details.

chatAnalysis.problem: customs problem 太笼统，客户不知道是等待审核、缺文件还是要缴税。
chatAnalysis.better: The shipment is currently under customs hold.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: The shipment is currently under customs hold, and we are checking the clearance status with the forwarder.

chatAnalysis.problem: 只描述现象，没有下一步动作。
chatAnalysis.better: I will contact the carrier for the latest tracking update.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: I will contact the carrier now and send you the latest tracking update once I receive it.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：客户问货在哪里

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Where is the shipment now?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The goods are still in transit.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: When will they arrive?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Based on the latest carrier update, the estimated arrival is next Monday.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The tracking says customs hold. What does it mean?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: It means the shipment is currently waiting for customs review.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Do they need any documents?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We are checking the clearance status with the forwarder and will update you if any documents are needed.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The tracking page shows a delivery exception.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I saw that. We are checking with the carrier to confirm the reason.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please solve it quickly. The goods are urgent.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. I will contact the carrier now and send you the latest tracking update as soon as possible.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：物流延误、清关卡住和跟踪更新

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, the tracking has not updated for two days. Where is the shipment now?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand your concern. Let me check the latest tracking update with the carrier.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The goods should have arrived already.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: According to the last update, the goods are still in transit.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Why is the shipment delayed?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We are checking the reason for the delayed shipment with the carrier.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you give me the estimated arrival?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The current estimated arrival is next Monday, but I will confirm again with the carrier today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Now the tracking page says customs hold.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: That means the shipment is currently waiting for customs review.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Do we need to provide any documents?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We are checking the clearance status with the forwarder and will let you know if any documents are needed.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please check if the invoice and packing list are enough.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will ask the forwarder whether customs needs any additional documents.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The final customer is pushing us every day.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. I will keep you posted and send updates as soon as I receive news from the carrier or forwarder.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What if it becomes a delivery exception?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If the tracking page shows a delivery exception, we will check whether the carrier needs address confirmation, customs documents, or receiver contact information.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you contact the local carrier directly?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We can ask our forwarder to contact the local carrier and confirm the latest status.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please send me an update before the end of today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will send you the latest tracking update before the end of today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If customs needs documents, send them immediately.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. We will prepare the customs documents and coordinate with your forwarder immediately if needed.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Thank you. Please keep tracking it closely.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. We will monitor the shipment closely and keep you posted until delivery is completed.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我们正在和承运商确认货物延误的原因。
exercises.answer: We are checking the reason for the delayed shipment with the carrier.
acceptable: we are checking the reason for the delayed shipment with the carrier
we are checking the reason for the delayed shipment with our carrier
exercises.hint: delayed shipment 是运输延误，carrier 是承运商。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更专业：customs problem
exercises.answer: The shipment is currently under customs hold, and we are checking the clearance status with the forwarder.
acceptable: the shipment is currently under customs hold and we are checking the clearance status with the forwarder
the shipment is under customs hold and we are checking the clearance status with the forwarder
exercises.hint: customs hold 和 clearance status 更具体。

exercises.prompt: 填空：The goods are still in ____.
客户说 tracking 两天没更新，哪个回复更适合？
options: I will contact the carrier now and send you the latest tracking update once I receive it.
exercises.answer: I will contact the carrier now and send you the latest tracking update once I receive it.
acceptable: i will contact the carrier now and send you the latest tracking update once i receive it
exercises.hint: 要给下一步动作：contact carrier + tracking update。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：根据最新承运商更新，预计到达时间是下周一。
exercises.answer: Based on the latest carrier update, the estimated arrival is next Monday.
acceptable: based on the latest carrier update the estimated arrival is next monday
according to the latest carrier update the estimated arrival is next monday
exercises.hint: estimated arrival 是预计到达时间。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：The tracking page shows a delivery exception. 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: We are checking with the carrier to confirm the reason and will update you as soon as possible.
acceptable: we are checking with the carrier to confirm the reason and will update you as soon as possible
we are checking with the carrier to confirm the reason and will send you an update as soon as possible
exercises.hint: delivery exception 要联系 carrier 查原因。

homework: 把 delayed shipment、customs hold、tracking update、in transit、clearance status、estimated arrival、carrier、delivery exception 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍，重点练 customs hold 和 tracking update。
写一段 WhatsApp 回复：客户说物流两天没更新且显示 customs hold，你要说明正在查 clearance status，并承诺今天给 tracking update。
tomorrow: Day 27 会练到货后反馈、破损和缺件处理。
